majority_class.note: predict 'False' for all; the do-nothing bar.

class_balance_note: 1 GO / 8 NO-GO — severe imbalance; raw accuracy is misleading, so balanced-accuracy/F1/MCC are the primary metrics in the execution receipt.

APOBR.literature_citation_note: Macrophage ApoB48 receptor; lipid handling; sparse curated diabetes GWAS.

CDKAL1.literature_citation_note: tRNA methylthiotransferase; 2007-era T2D locus; beta-cell proinsulin fidelity.

HNF1A.literature_citation_note: Liver/islet TF; MODY3 OMIM 600496; OMIM 'T1D 20' 612520 is legacy nomenclature.

KCNQ1.literature_citation_note: Cardiac K+ channel (LQT1); separately an imprinted T2D islet-secretion locus.

PGM1.literature_citation_note: Glycolysis/glycosylation enzyme; PGM1-CDG OMIM 614921; T1D-tagged locus, biology-vs-genetics discordance, likely passenger.

immune_go_terms: positive regulation of T cell activation
SIRPG.literature_citation_note: CD4/CD8 T-cell costimulatory receptor; T1D GWAS Barrett 2009 PMID 19430480; T-cell functional dissection Smith 2022 PMID 34799406.

SUOX.literature_citation_note: Mitochondrial sulfite oxidase; monogenic neonatal neuro disease OMIM 272300; 12q13 T1D locus disputed/gene-dense, likely LD passenger (Hakonarson 2008 PMID 18198356).

TCF7L2.literature_citation_note: Most replicated T2D locus; Wnt/beta-catenin islet TF.

ground_truth_rule: GO iff (has T-cell/immune GO annotation) AND (OT_T1D_assoc > OT_T2D_assoc) AND (not GWAS-T2D-tagged) AND (measured Treg-axis Rest score > 0). The immune-GO gate encodes the T-CELL construct; reads only structured API fields + assay data; no LLM verdict enters the rule.
pre_registered_win_condition: Claude must (1) beat the STRONGEST baseline (max of majority-class, eqtl-only, query-all = 8/9) by >= 2 correct, AND (2) achieve a higher MATTHEWS CORRELATION COEFFICIENT (MCC) than every baseline. Requiring MCC (not raw accuracy) prevents a trivial always-NO classifier from 'winning' under class imbalance. Both conditions must hold for a WIN. Otherwise TIE_NO_WIN (honest negative) or LOSS. n=9 is a PILOT — any result is reported as a pilot signal with a Wilson CI, not a validated capability claim.

provenance.gwas_catalog: live www.ebi.ac.uk/gwas/rest findByGene -> associationBySnp efoTraits (first 8 SNPs per gene).
provenance.immune_specificity: live mygene.info/v3 GO BP/MF terms, precise-pattern immune/T-cell match (curated GO annotation; the 'curated-immune source' the frozen orthogonal_truth_spec pre-registered).
provenance.llm_role: citation-gathering ONLY (literature_citation_note); does not set verdict.
provenance.measured_direction: src/trustlayer/axes.py treg_score, Rest, real GWCD4i.DE_stats.h5ad zscore, per-row on-target exclusion, gold-disjoint.
provenance.open_targets: live api.platform.opentargets.org v4 GraphQL, associatedDiseases datatype-resolved score, T1D vs T2D (0.0 if disease absent).

purpose: Day-0 Check A ORTHOGONAL GROUND TRUTH v3 — deterministic rule over LIVE non-LLM structured sources, now WITH the curated-immune-specificity gate the frozen spec promised (restored after v2 construct-validity BLOCK).
v2_to_v3_change: v2 lacked an immune-specificity gate and thus mislabeled SUOX (mitochondrial enzyme) and APOBR (macrophage receptor) as GO=True on T1D-locus genetics alone. v3 adds the MyGene.info GO immune/T-cell gate; these non-T-cell genes now correctly resolve to GO=False.
